network_summary: Dr. Sunita Sahu, DDS (UIC 2005) is a Chicago-area dentist who owns and operates at least three GP dental offices under separate legal-entity trade names: Esha Dental LLC (Addison, 60101), ER Dental Care Ltd / Complete Dental Care (Chicago, 60618), and Dental Wish Ltd (Chicago, 60623). She is the named principal on the Esha Dental BBB record and the featured doctor on completedentalcarechicago.com. No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE sponsor has been identified. This is a dentist-owned private multi-office group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Sunita Sahu, DDS — UIC College of Dentistry graduate 2005, named LLC principal of Esha Dental LLC (BBB record), featured doctor at Complete Dental Care / ER Dental Care Ltd (completedentalcarechicago.com), and listed provider at Dental Wish Ltd.
durable_artifacts: AO reach=3 across ZIPs 60101, 60618, 60623 — SUNITA SAHU as authorized official on NPI records 1194358960, 1538333604, 1760794176
BBB record confirms Dr. Sunita Sahu DDS as principal of Esha Dental LLC, 1409 W Lake St, Addison IL 60101 (bbb.org/us/il/addison/profile/dentist/esha-dental-llc-0654-1000095347)
completedentalcarechicago.com lists Dr. Sunita Sahu as the owner/doctor at 3205 W Irving Park Rd, Chicago IL 60618
Provider directories (CareCredit, vitadox, WebMD/Vitals) list Dr. Sunita Sahu among providers at Dental Wish Ltd, 4101 W 26th St, Chicago IL 60623
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The eshadental.com website pages are titled 'Dentex' in metadata — this appears to be the name of a website template/CMS vendor (Dentex dental website platform), NOT a DSO or MSO. No DSO management layer found. Note also that Dental Wish Ltd lists additional associate dentists (Eric Andersen, Ashley Seide, Ronald Winn, Ian Hoffman) suggesting Dr. Sahu may be one of several owners/operators at that location, though she is still listed as an authorized official on its NPI.
evidence_chain: Federal AO signal: SUNITA SAHU appears as authorized official on three separately-addressed GP NPI org records across ZIPs 60101 (ESHA DENTAL LLC), 60618 (ER DENTAL CARE LTD), 60623 (DENTAL WISH LTD). Documentary corroboration: (1) BBB business profile for Esha Dental LLC explicitly names Dr. Sunita Sahu DDS as principal and confirms the Addison LLC; (2) completedentalcarechicago.com is the consumer-facing website for 3205 W Irving Park Rd and features Dr. Sunita Sahu as the named doctor; (3) multiple provider directories (LocalMed, vitadox, CareCredit, WebMD) cross-list Dr. Sunita Sahu at the Dental Wish Ltd address. No management-company entity, MSO, DSO platform, or PE sponsor was found in three targeted web searches. Structure is dentist-owned multi-office private group.
future_app_notes: Confirm Dr. Sahu's ownership role at Dental Wish Ltd more precisely — she may be an associate rather than owner at that location, given additional named dentists there. The Dental Wish Ltd NPI (1760794176) registered 2010, predating Esha Dental (2019/2020), so she may have joined Dental Wish later. If a follow-up search locates an Illinois Articles of Organization or operating agreement for Dental Wish Ltd naming Sahu as owner, that would solidify the ready_for_validation status for location f62241c4286271dd.

Dr. Sunita Sahu is listed as authorized official on the NPPES NPI record (registered 2010) and appears in provider directories at this address. However, multiple other named dentists (Eric Andersen, Ashley Seide, Ronald Winn, Ian Hoffman) are listed at this practice, and no dedicated website or BBB/Secretary of State filing was found that clearly names Dr. Sahu as owner vs. associate. The AO designation on an older multi-provider Ltd entity may reflect a credentialing/admin role rather than sole ownership. Classifying candidate (not ready_for_validation) pending confirmation of her ownership stake at this specific entity. Structural picture remains dentist_multi: no DSO/MSO/PE evidence whatsoever.
